/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdc_encoder_service__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libdc_encoder_service__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/dc_encoder_service__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dc_encoder_service/srv/detail/motor_pi__description.c.o CMakeFiles/dc_encoder_service__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dc_encoder_service/srv/detail/motor_pi__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/dc_encoder_service__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dc_encoder_service/srv/detail/motor_pi__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
